French hardline CGT union has filed strike notices for public sector workers during the Paris summer Olympics, BFM TV reported on Wednesday, citing a top CGT union official.

title: French CGT union files strike notices for public sector during Paris Olympics - CGTN
author: CGTN
description: French hardline CGT union has filed strike notices for public sector workers during the Paris summer Olympics, BFM TV reported on Wednesday, citing a top CGT union official.
